title: URN namespace reconcile to canonical urn:luhtech:ectropy with type-first shape
description: Reconcile production code and database from legacy 'urn:ectropy:*' to canonical 'urn:luhtech:ectropy:<type>:<id>' shape matching portfolio canonical pattern (urn:luhtech:ectropy:feature:*, urn:luhtech:ectropy:authority-level:*). 12 emitter sites across 6 files; Prisma SQL migration for voxels.urn, pm_decisions.urn, pm_decisions.primary_voxel_urn with regex-based REPLACE preserving project/id segments while flipping project-first sites (stage-4-ifc, stage-6-decisions, voxels.routes:704) to canonical type-first. Aggregation query swap deferred to PR 1.2 (d-2026-06-XX-eb-voxel-decision-aggregation-fix). Scaling rationale: portfolio canonical URN pattern is type-first; consistent shape eliminates ambiguity when new resource types adopt the URN namespace.

outputs.description: Canonical URN emitter rename across 12 sites in 6 production files. Sites 1-4 (stage-4-ifc line 319, stage-6-decisions lines 165 and 189, voxels.routes line 704) flip from project-first 'urn:ectropy:{projectId}:{type}:{id}' to canonical type-first 'urn:luhtech:ectropy:{type}:{projectId}:{id}'. Sites 5-12 (contract-upload, voxel.resolvers, decision-lifecycle.resolvers) keep their existing type-first shape and only update the prefix from 'urn:ectropy:' to 'urn:luhtech:ectropy:'.
acceptanceCriteria: grep -rn 'urn:ectropy:' apps/ services/ libs/ --include='*.ts' returns ZERO matches outside test files that intentionally exercise legacy-format inputs
grep -rn 'urn:luhtech:ectropy:voxel:' apps/api-gateway/src returns matches at stage-4-ifc.ts, stage-6-decisions.ts, voxels.routes.ts (confirming shape flip)
grep -rn 'urn:luhtech:ectropy:contract:' apps/api-gateway/src returns match at contract-upload.routes.ts
grep -rn 'urn:luhtech:ectropy:' apps/mcp-server/src/graphql returns matches at voxel.resolvers (3 sites) and decision-lifecycle.resolvers (4 sites)
TypeScript compile (tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.app.json) passes with zero errors
ESLint passes on all 6 modified files

outputs.description: Prisma migration 20260606_urn_canonical_reconcile applies a regex-based UPDATE to three confirmed URN columns: voxels.urn, pm_decisions.urn, pm_decisions.primary_voxel_urn. Migration uses Postgres regexp_replace with capture groups to flip project-first segments to type-first canonical form. Wrapped in BEGIN/COMMIT for transactional atomicity. Includes a post-UPDATE audit block raising NOTICE if any legacy 'urn:ectropy:%' rows remain (advisory, not blocking).
acceptanceCriteria: migration.sql applies cleanly on a fresh Prisma database with prisma migrate deploy (exit 0)
Re-running the migration on already-migrated data yields zero row changes (idempotent — regex WHERE clause filters legacy-only)
After apply, SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voxels WHERE urn LIKE 'urn:ectropy:%' returns 0
After apply, SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_decisions WHERE urn LIKE 'urn:ectropy:%' returns 0
After apply, SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_decisions WHERE primary_voxel_urn LIKE 'urn:ectropy:%' returns 0
After apply, sample SELECT confirms voxels.urn matches 'urn:luhtech:ectropy:voxel:<projectId>:<voxelId>' shape
After apply, sample SELECT confirms pm_decisions.primary_voxel_urn matches voxels.urn shape exactly (enables PR 1.2 join fix)
migration/README.md documents the regex transformation, the columns touched, and the idempotency guarantee

outputs.description: Substrate-honest amendment to FU-EB-VOXELIZER-LEVEL-EXTRACTION-FIX-1 in .roadmap/follow-up-register.json. The current title 'Voxelizer level extraction + decision aggregation handler fix (Maple Ridge data quality)' misrepresents the root cause — substrate research confirmed the voxelizer extractor reads IfcBuildingStorey correctly; the bad name 'Level 1 Living Rm.' is real source-IFC data. Amend the title and description to accurately scope the actual work: aggregation join fix (PR 1.2 scope) and source IFC storey-name cleanup (Arc 2 scope). No closure in this PR — only substrate correction. Register version patch-bumps.
acceptanceCriteria: FU-EB-VOXELIZER-LEVEL-EXTRACTION-FIX-1 title updated to reflect actual root cause (aggregation join + source IFC storey data)
FU description updated with substrate-corrected analysis citing voxels.routes.ts:858 (aggregation) and Maple Ridge Ifc4_Revit_ARC.ifc (storey naming)
FU status remains 'open' — no closure in this PR
follow-up-register meta.totalCount unchanged
follow-up-register version increments by patch level
ajv canonical 3-flag validation against follow-up-register.schema.json v1.1.0 passes

outputs.description: DEC entry 'd-2026-06-06-urn-canonical-shape-type-first' appended to .roadmap/decision-log.json per decision-log.schema.v2.json. Locks the canonical URN shape decision as type-first ('urn:luhtech:ectropy:<type>:<id>') matching portfolio canonical pattern. Provides context (shape ambiguity in current emitters), constraints (n8n PostgreSQL pipeline must remain live), alternatives considered (project-first vs type-first), decision (type-first), rationale (scaling alignment with portfolio canonical), consequences (positive/negative/risks), category=architecture, status=approved, impact per impactLevel enum. References relatedDecisions and impactedDeliverables.
acceptanceCriteria: DEC entry decisionId matches pattern '^d-[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}-[a-z0-9-]+$'
DEC entry includes all 9 required fields per decision-log v2 schema: decisionId, timestamp, title, context, decision, rationale, status, category, impact
category set to 'architecture'
status set to 'approved'
approvedBy includes 'erik-luh' (memory #13: approvedBy is array per canonical 15-field shape)
impactedDeliverables includes 'd-2026-06-06-eb-urn-namespace-reconcile' and the planned 'd-2026-06-XX-eb-voxel-decision-aggregation-fix'
ajv canonical 3-flag validation against decision-log.schema.v2.json passes
decision-log meta.lastUpdated touched to authoring date

Aggregation behavior change is PR 1.2 scope.

transitions.trigger: L4 named-step approval: 'proceed with authoring PR 1.1 deliverable as written, approved'

notes:
PR 1.1 of Arc 1 (URN reconcile arc). Closes FU-EB-URN-NAMESPACE-RECONCILE-1 (P1) clean. Substrate-corrects (does NOT close) FU-EB-VOXELIZER-LEVEL-EXTRACTION-FIX-1 title. Aggregation join fix is PR 1.2 scope (d-2026-06-XX-eb-voxel-decision-aggregation-fix) which depends on this PR being merged + production-deployed first (PR 1.2's join condition pd.primary_voxel_urn = v.urn requires both columns in canonical form). Maple Ridge IFC source storey-name cleanup is Arc 2 scope (separate L4 named-step). Hard Constraint #1: n8n PostgreSQL pipeline (159.223.203.231) MUST remain live throughout deploy — migration UPDATE statements are non-blocking writes and acquire only brief row locks. Cross-repo doctrine F0B85LNSTC4: this spec gets posted to Slack channel C0B7EPFCA85 with file SHA256 + bytes + validation status; SR-chat picks up from channel and lands SR anchor at schemas/_instances/deliverables/d-2026-06-06-eb-urn-namespace-reconcile.json on luh-tech/schema-registry. Memory #20 substrate honesty: scope file paths for tests reflect convention; if execution discovers actual paths differ (e.g., co-located *.test.ts files not in __tests__ subdirs), spec amends to v1.0.1 via SR PR per established pattern (see d-2026-06-05-eb-tier1-t1-foundation v1.0.1->v1.0.4 amendment chain).

Enterprise Excellence. Schema-First. No Shortcuts.
